title: Fermentomato
description: A silky and energizing Greek-inspired dish featuring a vegan-friendly tomato sauce, sautéed with garlic and olive oil for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Wash tomatoes thoroughly. Cut them into quarters.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Add quartered tomatoes to the skillet, reduce heat to low, cover, and let simmer for about 15-20 minutes or until desired thickness is reached (like a sauce).
Season with salt and pepper. If desired, add lemon juice for a tangy touch.
Serve immediately as a side dish or over pasta.
